# firdaria

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/firdaria"
```

Package firdaria implements the Firdaria \(Firdar\) planetary period system, a Persian time\-lord technique used in traditional Western astrology.

CalcFirdaria computes all planetary periods and identifies the current period and sub\-period for a given age. CalcFirdariaTimeline returns only those periods that overlap a specified age range.

## Index

- [type FirdariaPeriod](<#FirdariaPeriod>)
  - [func CalcFirdariaTimeline\(isDayBirth bool, startAge, endAge float64\) \[\]FirdariaPeriod](<#CalcFirdariaTimeline>)

<a name="FirdariaPeriod"></a>
## type [FirdariaPeriod](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/firdaria/firdaria.go#L14-L20>)

FirdariaPeriod represents a major Firdaria period ruled by a single planet.

```go
type FirdariaPeriod struct {
    Lord       models.PlanetID `json:"lord"`
    Years      float64         `json:"years"`
    StartAge   float64         `json:"start_age"`
    EndAge     float64         `json:"end_age"`
    SubPeriods []SubPeriod     `json:"sub_periods"`
}
```

<a name="CalcFirdariaTimeline"></a>
### func [CalcFirdariaTimeline](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/firdaria/firdaria.go#L175>)

```go
func CalcFirdariaTimeline(isDayBirth bool, startAge, endAge float64) []FirdariaPeriod
```

CalcFirdariaTimeline returns only those Firdaria periods that overlap the given age range \[startAge, endAge\].

<a name="FirdariaResult"></a>
## type [FirdariaResult](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/firdaria/firdaria.go#L6-L11>)

FirdariaResult holds the complete Firdaria analysis for a given age.

```go
type FirdariaResult struct {
    IsDayBirth    bool             `json:"is_day_birth"`
    Periods       []FirdariaPeriod `json:"periods"`
    CurrentPeriod *FirdariaPeriod  `json:"current_period,omitempty"`
    CurrentSub    *SubPeriod       `json:"current_sub_period,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="CalcFirdaria"></a>
### func [CalcFirdaria](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/firdaria/firdaria.go#L133>)

```go
func CalcFirdaria(isDayBirth bool, age float64) *FirdariaResult
```

CalcFirdaria calculates all Firdaria periods and identifies the current period and sub\-period for the given age. The cycle repeats every 75 years.

<a name="SubPeriod"></a>
## type [SubPeriod](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/firdaria/firdaria.go#L23-L27>)

SubPeriod represents a sub\-period within a major Firdaria period.

```go
type SubPeriod struct {
    Lord     models.PlanetID `json:"lord"`
    StartAge float64         `json:"start_age"`
    EndAge   float64         `json:"end_age"`
}
```
